title: Turf War
description: A rival crew from Thornfield has moved into Dalhurst territory, running protection rackets on merchants the Guild already controls. They're bold, well-armed, and led by a woman named 'Red Mara' who has no respect for established boundaries. The fence wants you to handle it. You could hit their operation directly - burn their stash house, kill their enforcers. Or negotiate a territorial agreement if you're persuasive. There's even a third option: if you can defeat Red Mara in single combat and she yields, her crew might join the Guild instead. Power, diplomacy, or violence - pick your weapon.

objectives.description: Find the rival crew's base of operations in Dalhurst
Confront Red Mara about the territorial dispute
Resolve the turf war by any means necessary
Report the outcome to the Guild fence

notes: Multi-solution conflict quest. Violence route: kill enforcers + Red Mara, destroy stash house (combat-heavy). Negotiation route: DC 18 Persuasion check to split territory peacefully. Duel route: Challenge Red Mara to 1v1 combat (non-lethal), defeat her to absorb her crew into the Guild AND recruit her as a follower. Best outcome is duel victory - gains manpower for Guild and unlocks Red Mara companion. Failed negotiation leaves situation unresolved and triggers ongoing random encounters with rival crew.
